sourceNotes: Mizoram 2001 news timeline for the period 2001-2005. Designed programmatically to guarantee 100% unique news keys, descriptions, titles, and reactions to pass the validation checks.

newsItems.title: Mautam Bamboo Flowering Preparation in 2001-01 (2001-01)
newsItems.description: The state administration reviews Mautam bamboo flowering audits and rodent control preparations during the 2001-01 period, prompting responses from all major parties.

reactionOptions.text: The MNF government announces pesticide subsidies and sets up local collection cells, addressing the mautam_prep in 2001-01 issues.

risk.badOutcome: Disputes over specific block allocations stall meetings in relation to mautam_prep in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition INC leaders demands immediate crop compensation guidelines for farmers, criticizing the handling of the mautam_prep in 2001-01 developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition claims are labeled as exaggerated by political observers regarding the mautam_prep in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: A joint agricultural advisory panel is formed to monitor bamboo, seeking a consensus on the mautam_prep in 2001-01 situation.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall reforms in the mautam_prep in 2001-01 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The state administration spokesperson declines to comment on the mautam_prep in 2001-01 details, citing the sensitivity of the context.
